rationale: Gov't Code §2001.040 governs judicial remand of agency rules found noncompliant with procedural requirements. The proposed statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b) sets exemption amounts by statute, not agency rule, so no conflict arises.
quote: If a court finds that an agency has not substantially complied with one or more procedural requirements of Sections 2001.022 through 2001.034, the court may remand the rule, or a portion of the rule, to the agency
_note: No conflict. §2001.040 is a general APA provision on judicial review of agency rules; the proposed change amends a tax statute directly. Any comptroller rule referencing the old $140,000 figure would need rulemaking update, but that is not a conflict with this section.
